name: I-Metronidazole
description: I-Nitroimidazole antibiotic ene-anaerobic enhle kakhulu kanye ne-protozoal coverage. Ibalulekile ekungeneni kokulimala kwesisu/amathumbu ukumboza amathumbu e-anaerobic. Ngokuvamile isetshenziswa ngokuhlanganiswa ne-ciprofloxacin.
dose: 500 mg IV q6-8h. I-PO: 500 mg q8h (uma ibekezelelwa ngomlomo).
contraindications: I-metronidazole eyaziwayo noma i-nitroimidazole yokungezwani komzimba
warnings: Ukusabela okufana ne-Disulfiram ngotshwala -- ungadli utshwala ngesikhathi sokwelashwa nangemva kwamahora angama-48.
Ingase ibangele i-peripheral neuropathy ngokusetshenziswa isikhathi eside.

pediatric.note: Iphephile ezinganeni ezindala. Gwema ezinganeni ezisanda kuzalwa.

obstetric.note: Gwema ku-trimester yokuqala uma kungenzeka. Sebenzisa i-trimester yesibili/yesithathu lapho kudingeka ngokokwelashwa -- inzuzo ngokuvamile idlula ingozi yezifo ezinzima ze-anaerobic.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Abdominal Trauma
